_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PELICAN PANEL - HTTPS://PELICAN.DEV/
name: Banana Shooter
author: sem@osesem.xyz
description: Banana Shooter is a fun, fast-paced multiplayer arena shooter where players battle it out on various maps. The player with the highest kill count gets a special weapon: bananas! Supports multiple game modes including Deathmatch, Infected, Kill Confirm, Knockout, and Catch the Banana.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Banana Shooter Dedicated Server Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Image to install with is 'ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian'

##
#
# Variables
# STEAM_USER, STEAM_PASS, STEAM_AUTH - Steam user setup. If a user has 2fa enabled it will most likely fail due to timeout.
# SRCDS_APPID - steam app id for the dedicated server (2406780 for Banana Shooter DS)
# NOTE: Banana Shooter DS requires a Steam account that owns the game. Anonymous login will NOT work.
#
##

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "\n--- ERROR ---"
    echo -e "Banana Shooter Dedicated Server requires a Steam account that owns the game."
    echo -e "Anonymous login will NOT work. Please set STEAM_USER and STEAM_PASS.\n"
    exit 1
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) validate +quit

## set up 32 and 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

# Ensure the server binary and shell scripts are executable
chmod +x /mnt/server/BSDS.x86_64 2>/dev/null
chmod +x /mnt/server/ExampleServer.sh 2>/dev/null
chmod +x /mnt/server/ModdedServer.sh 2>/dev/null

echo -e "\n--- Banana Shooter Dedicated Server installed successfully ---\n"
echo -e "Note: On first launch, the server will generate Config.json in Servers/{ServerName}/"
echo -e "Set your GSLT (Game Server Login Token) for the server to appear on the community server list."
echo -e "Create a GSLT at: https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers using AppID 1949740\n"

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The server identity name. This is used as the folder name for server data in the Servers/ directory, and is passed as the +Server argument. Use no spaces or wrap in quotes.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: The maximum number of players allowed on the server.

variables.name: Game Server Login Token (GSLT)
variables.description: Required for your server to appear in the public community server list. Create one at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers using AppID 1949740. Your Steam account must own the game, not be limited, and have a verified phone number. Without a GSLT, the server will only be visible on LAN.

variables.name: App ID
variables.description: The Steam App ID for the Banana Shooter Dedicated Server. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.

variables.name: Steam User
variables.description: Steam account used for SteamCMD authentication. REQUIRED - Banana Shooter DS cannot be downloaded anonymously. The account must own Banana Shooter.

variables.name: Steam Password
variables.description: Password for the Steam account. REQUIRED for Banana Shooter DS installation.

variables.name: Steam Auth Code
variables.description: Steam Guard 2FA code. Required if using a Steam account with Steam Guard enabled. You may need to reinstall to enter a new code.

variables.name: Beta Branch
variables.description: Set a beta branch to install. Leave blank to use the default/public branch.

variables.name: Beta Branch Password
variables.description: Password for a private beta branch. Leave blank if not needed.
